name: bilibili-analyzer
description: A web application to analyze Bilibili user composition

scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --handle-input "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.vercel-build: npm install && cd backend && npm install && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm install && npm run build
